subject: stories restaurant deserves better than a dead website
body:
Hi there,

I was looking up places on the Indiana Tenderloin Trail and found Storie's -- 49 years of hand-pounded tenderloins and handmade pies is impressive.

But your website at storiesrestaurant.com isn't loading at all. People searching for restaurants near the square are finding your competitors first.

I can mock up what your menu page could look like on mobile -- clean, easy to scroll, loads fast. Takes me 10 minutes and it's yours to keep.

Want me to send it over?

Eric Lefler
OphidianAI
